overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking along a covered sidewalk in a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character walks past various storefronts and holographic advertisements while other pedestrians and vehicles move through the cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under metal overpass

events.description: large truck drives past on the multi-lane road to the right
companion in yellow plaid shirt stops walking and moves to the left, exiting the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk following a companion in a yellow plaid shirt

notable_agents.action: companion in yellow plaid shirt walking alongside ego, then stops and moves away to the left
large commercial truck driving past on the road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: industrial metal grate ceiling of the covered pedestrian walkway with exposed beams
dark reflective glass storefront windows lining the left side of the walkway
orange and silver metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and cyan neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered urban walkway at night, illuminated by cyan and pink neon lights. The ego character walks forward following a companion in a yellow plaid shirt, while glass storefronts line the left side and a metal guardrail separates the path from a multi-lane road where a large truck passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching commercial advertisement district

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the covered sidewalk after the companion has departed

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction as ego

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure with illuminated advertisements visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The ego continues walking along the covered walkway, now without the companion. The glass storefronts give way to plain concrete walls, and a tall vertical advertisement structure becomes visible in the distance ahead. The walkway remains sheltered under the metal ceiling with neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with large holographic billboards

events.description: large illuminated holographic billboards become prominent on the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking past large holographic advertisements while approaching a group of pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction
group of pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement displaying a face with green glasses and promotional text
vertical advertisement showing smiling face with '2 SWEET SPEED' and 'LIFE IS TOO SHORT TO BE SLOW' text
tall pillar with 'CHOOH2' signage and yellow-black hazard stripes at the base

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens into a section dominated by massive holographic billboards on the left wall, including a prominent '2 Sweet Speed' advertisement. The ego walks past these bright illuminated displays while approaching a group of pedestrians ahead. A vertical pillar with 'CHOOH2' branding stands near the center of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic urban walkway that evolves from a commercial storefront area into a corridor of massive holographic displays. It begins on a covered path illuminated by cyan and pink neon lights, following a companion in a yellow plaid shirt past glass storefronts and a passing truck. As the companion disappears from view, the glass facades transition into plain concrete walls while a tall vertical advertisement structure emerges in the distance. The scene then opens into a vibrant section dominated by towering holographic billboards, including a prominent 2 Sweet Speed advertisement, as the camera passes a CHOOH2 branded pillar. Finally, the path leads toward a gathering of pedestrians under the glow of the bright, illuminated displays.
